ogTitle: Paddys River vs Padstow: Climate Safety

heading: Paddys River vs Padstow — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Paddys River, New South Wales and Padstow, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Paddys River has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Padstow (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Paddys River or Padstow safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Paddys River has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Padstow scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Paddys River scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Padstow scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Paddys River or Padstow?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Paddys River has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.92% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
